allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = d.get\('message', {}\) role = msg.get\('role', ''\) content = msg.get\('content', []\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': txt = c.get\('text', ''\) if len\(txt\) > 20: print\(f'[{role}] {txt[:200]}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
